name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_FUNCTION_PATENT_COUNT
description: Top assignees by functional category patent count. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Within target-pair combinations related to the Pathologic_Protein_Target category, which companies filed the most patents? Please provide the top 10.
Within target-pair combinations related to the Innate_Immune_Checkpoint_Target category, which companies filed the most patents? Please provide the top 10.
Within target-pair combinations related to the T_Cell_Engagement_Target category, which companies filed the most patents? Please provide the top 10.
